meaning: n.独轮手推车,手推车vt.用于推车运送
examples: The old man lifted the wheelbarrow and trundled it away.
I put on heavy shoes and rolled out my wheelbarrow.
Luckily a butcher soon came by, driving a pig in a wheelbarrow.
The eight tokens are an iron, racecar, Scottie dog, a shoe, thimble, top hat, wheelbarrow and battleship.
Clinics run by aid agencies are being swamped by the sick, some brought in by wheelbarrow or cart.
